sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91519" key="pu/c2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πύξ</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πῡγός, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, later form for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυγή</foreign> (q. v.). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πύξαγρις</orth>, <sense id="n91519.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πτύξαγρις</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
